note: Never remove radiator or expansion tank cap when the engine is hot. Allow sufficient cool-down time.
Do not work near the turbocharger or fan while the engine is running. Keep loose clothing and tools clear.
Work in a well-ventilated area away from ignition sources. Use spill trays and absorbent material for fuel leaks.
Disconnect batteries before servicing main power cables. Use insulated tools when possible.
Always secure the truck with parking brake and wheel chocks before working underneath or around moving components.
